title: stachys albiflora
intro: Stachys albiflora, also known as White Betony, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Stachys albiflora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating digestive issues. Stachys albiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it easily accessible for those seeking its medicinal benefits.
